nodes.name: Palani laughingthrush
nodes.summary: Palani laughingthrush（Palani laughingthrush，学名 Montecincla fairbanki），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 伯爾尼丘陵
nodes.summary: 伯爾尼丘陵是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Palani laughingthrush、Nilgiri flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿奈馬萊丘陵
nodes.summary: 阿奈馬萊丘陵是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Palani laughingthrush、Nilgiri flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 喀拉拉邦
nodes.summary: 喀拉拉邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括栗鸢、Greater flameback、暗灰鵑鵙等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Achankovil
nodes.summary: Achankovil is a 128 km (80 mi) long west flowing river in Kerala, India.

nodes.name: 泰米尔纳德邦
nodes.summary: 泰米尔纳德邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括斑头雁、鳞喉啄木鸟、Ashambu laughingthrush等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is found in the Palni Hills while another closely related form, the Ashambu laughingthrush (Montecincla meridionalis) with a shorter white brow is found in the high hills south of the Achankovil Gap and was treated as a subspecies

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is found in the Palni Hills while another closely related form, the Ashambu laughingthrush (Montecincla meridionalis) with a shorter white brow is found in the high hills south of the Achankovil Gap and was treated as a subspecies

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is restricted south of the Palghat Gap with the main distribution range in the higher regions (above ) of the Palani Hills extending into the Annamalai Hills in western Tamil Nadu and Munnar in Kerala

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Found in the high montane forests, this grey bibbed, rufous bellied bird with a prominent dark eyestripe and broad white brow was grouped along with the grey-breasted subspecies of the black-chinned laughingthrush and known as the grey-breasted laughingthrush
